title: Report on the proposed subsidy to Berkeley Homes (East Thames) Limited by Homes England
body: "The SAU has published its report providing advice to Homes England concerning the proposed subsidy to Berkeley Homes.  The report includes the SAU’s evaluation of Homes England’s assessment of compliance of its proposed scheme with the requirements set out in the Subsidy Control Act 2022.  For more information visit the Referral of the proposed subsidy to Berkeley Homes (East Thames) Limited by Homes England case page. "
